title: Index corruption following aggressive use of ON CONFLICT clause.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, name String, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'A', 10.5) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = value + 1;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'A', 20.0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = value + 2;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'B', NULL) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = COALESCE(value, 0) + 5;
key_bug_features: Aggressive use of ON CONFLICT clause
